prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on water (H₂O) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard', PySCF RKS, density-fitted), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied water.xyz (single point — no re-optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported (clean run). HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV, HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV. integrity.trustworthy = true. Provenance: computed.
